options.title: Find your remote for the Conference Room TV

steps.instruction: The remote generally floats somewhere on the large wooden table. Should look as follows
steps.alt: Picture showing what the remote looks like
Showing the action of turning the TV on

steps.instruction: Now, let's make sure the TV is on the right input. It should be on Input 2
Time to locate our conference room computer. It lives on the tray beneath the Conference room TV
steps.alt: Picture showing where the shared space computer is.

steps.instruction: Let's start from scratch here. Hold down the power button down until the light on the power button is off.
steps.alt: Video showing the powering down of the shared space computer

steps.instruction: Now that the computer is off, let's turn it on.
steps.alt: Video showing the powering on of the shared space computer

steps.instruction: Voila! If you've successfully followed the steps, your TV screen should look like the following after some time.
steps.alt: Picture showing the basic login windows screen of the computer

steps.instruction: Try to locate your keyboard and mouse, this also lives somewhere on the main wooden table.
steps.alt: Picture showing where the keyboard and mouse usually are
